notes: National lead-gen site. Programmatic service×city architecture. 10 verticals. New domain — cluster map drives page priority decisions only.

pillar.title: Industrial Rigging & Machinery Moving Services: The Complete Guide
pillar.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 60-70 KD (ESTIMATE). Top 10 dominated by ProLift, Omega Morgan, Rigging-Busters, Beck & Pollitzer — all multi-location nationals with 10+ years domain age.

clusters.name: Rigging & Heavy Lift
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 7-9 between 'industrial rigging company', 'rigging services near me', 'rigging company near me', and 'heavy lift rigging' — all return ProLift, Rigging-Busters, Omega Morgan, Barnhart in top 10. Same-page or same-cluster threshold met. 'Crane and rigging' is adjacent (overlap ~5) so placed here rather than separate.

posts.title: Industrial Rigging Company: What to Look For and How to Get a Quote
posts.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 65 KD (ESTIMATE). Nationals own this SERP.
posts.cannibalization_check: CLEAR — primary differs from pillar 'industrial rigging services'; secondary overlap is intentional and minimal

posts.title: Crane and Rigging Services: When You Need a Crane vs. Ground Rigging
posts.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 70 KD (ESTIMATE). Bigge, Barnhart, TNT Crane dominate. Crane rental adds heavy cross-industry competition.
posts.cannibalization_check: CLEAR — crane dimension differentiates from post-0

posts.title: How Much Do Rigging Services Cost? (2026 Price Breakdown)
posts.keyword: how much do rigging services cost
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 40 KD (ESTIMATE). Mix of blog posts, forum threads (Practical Machinist), and service pages. Winnable with a thorough cost guide.
posts.cannibalization_check: CLEAR — informational intent separates from commercial posts 0 and 1

clusters.name: Machinery Moving & Equipment Relocation
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 8-10 between 'machinery movers company', 'machinery moving services', 'machine movers near me' — all return Beck & Pollitzer, Omega Morgan, US Machinery Movers, California Machinery Movers. Separate cluster from rigging (overlap 3-4 cross-cluster) because top results diverge: machinery movers SERPs return generalist mover sites while rigging SERPs are dominated by crane/lift specialists.

posts.title: Machinery Movers: How to Choose and What to Expect
posts.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 62 KD (ESTIMATE). Beck & Pollitzer, Omega Morgan, consolidated incumbents with deep authority.

posts.title: Heavy Equipment Loading and Unloading Services: What's Involved
posts.keyword: heavy equipment loading and unloading services
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 45 KD (ESTIMATE). Rigging-Busters owns most city variants of this. National-level page is more open.

posts.title: How Much Does It Cost to Move Industrial Equipment? (Full Breakdown)
secondary_keywords: how much does it cost to move heavy equipment
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 42 KD (ESTIMATE). Accuwright, Smooth Move People, Freedom Heavy Haul have cost guides but thin content. Opportunity to outrank with a comprehensive guide.

posts.title: How to Safely Move Heavy Industrial Equipment: A Step-by-Step Guide
posts.keyword: how to move heavy industrial equipment
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 38 KD (ESTIMATE). Freedom Heavy Haul, GKS Lifting, Armstrong rank here with thin how-to posts. Thorough guide wins.

clusters.name: CNC & Machine Tool Moving
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 9-10 between 'CNC machine movers', 'CNC machine moving services', 'machine tool moving company' — all return Rigging Force, Rigging-Busters city pages, Eagle Rigging, MEI. Overlap with general machinery moving is only 3-4 (Sullivan Industrial appears in both, but others diverge). Own cluster warranted. Separate posts for 'CNC machine movers' (commercial) and 'cost to move CNC machine' (informational) — confirmed separate SERPs.

posts.title: CNC Machine Movers: Precision Handling for Machining Centers, Lathes & More
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM-HIGH — 52 KD (ESTIMATE). Rigging-Busters runs heavily programmatic city pages here (20+ indexed). National editorial page can compete for head term.

posts.title: How Much Does It Cost to Move a CNC Machine? (2026 Pricing Guide)
posts.keyword: how much does it cost to move a CNC machine
secondary_keywords: cost to move a CNC machine
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 38 KD (ESTIMATE). Rigging Force has a dedicated page, AllPro Rigging has a blog post, Practical Machinist forum threads appear. Solid content wins this.

posts.title: CNC Machine Moving Checklist: Protecting Your Machine Before, During, and After
secondary_keywords: how to move a CNC machine
posts.difficulty_estimate: LOW-MEDIUM — 28 KD (ESTIMATE). Eagle Rigging and Sullivan Industrial have thin posts. Very winnable with a detailed, expert checklist.

clusters.name: Plant & Factory Relocation
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 8-10 between 'plant relocation services', 'factory relocation company', 'factory relocation services' — all return Beck & Pollitzer, Meyer, Alltracon, R. Baker & Son consistently. Overlap with general machinery moving is 4-5 (same domains, different specific pages). Own cluster. 'Production line relocation' sits at overlap 6 with this cluster — placed as spoke-3.

posts.title: Plant Relocation Services: Full-Scope Industrial Facility Moves
posts.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 60 KD (ESTIMATE). Beck & Pollitzer, Meyer, Alltracon all have authoritative pages. Long sales cycle means searchers dig deep — thorough content matters.

posts.title: Factory Relocation Cost: What a Full Plant Move Actually Costs in 2026
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 44 KD (ESTIMATE). Alltracon, Midland Machinery, OKSEL have cost articles. The Alltracon 'estimating costs' post is the benchmark. Beatable with more US-specific data.

posts.title: Production Line Relocation: Planning a Multi-Machine Move Without Killing Uptime
posts.difficulty_estimate: LOW-MEDIUM — 32 KD (ESTIMATE). Bruce Industrial and a few OEMs rank here. Low competition, specialized topic. Strong opportunity for a new domain.

clusters.name: Millwright Services
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 8-9 between 'millwright services', 'millwright company near me', 'industrial millwright services' — all return Millwright Industrial LLC, MEI, Atlantic Millwrights, Champion Industrial. Overlap with equipment installation is 5-6 (Beck & Pollitzer, Alltracon appear in both) — kept in same cluster. Overlap with machinery moving is 3-4 — separate cluster with cross-links planned.

posts.title: Millwright Services: Precision Installation, Alignment & Mechanical Maintenance
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM-HIGH — 55 KD (ESTIMATE). Several mid-sized regional companies rank. A national-positioning page can compete for the head term.

posts.title: What Does a Millwright Do? Roles, Skills & When You Need One
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 40 KD (ESTIMATE). CareerExplorer, Stevens EC, Champion Industrial, Beck & Pollitzer rank here. Informational pages — a well-written explainer from a service provider can rank.

posts.title: Industrial Equipment Installation: Setting, Leveling, and Aligning Heavy Machinery
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 48 KD (ESTIMATE). Beck & Pollitzer, Alltracon, Cornerstone Mechanical rank. Topic adjacent enough to millwright to cluster here (SERP overlap ~5-6).

clusters.name: Heavy Haul Trucking & Oversize Transport
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 9-10 between 'heavy haul trucking', 'oversize load transport', 'heavy haul company near me' — all return ATS Specialized, Freedom Heavy Haul, Heavy Haulers, NTS Logistics. Overlap with rigging is only 1-2 (completely separate SERPs — trucking/freight vs. rigging/lifting specialists). Own cluster. Overlap with plant relocation is 3-4 (Alltracon, R. Baker appear in both) — cross-link recommended.

posts.title: Heavy Haul Trucking Services: Oversize Load Transport Across All 50 States
posts.difficulty_estimate: HIGH — 68 KD (ESTIMATE). ATS, Freedom Heavy Haul, Heavy Haulers all massive domains. National head term is extremely difficult for a new domain.

posts.title: Oversize Load Transport: Permits, Escorts, and State Rules Explained
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM-HIGH — 55 KD (ESTIMATE). Heavy Haulers, Freedom Heavy Haul, J.J. Keller dominate. State-specific permit breakdowns are the winning angle.

posts.title: Heavy Haul Trucking Cost: What Oversize Loads Cost Per Mile in 2026
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 45 KD (ESTIMATE). A1 Auto Transport, Freedom Heavy Haul, ATS have cost guides. This is very winnable for a trucking-adjacent brand with real rate data.

clusters.name: MRI & Medical Equipment Moving (Adjacent)
clusters.rationale: SERP overlap 8-9 between 'MRI machine moving', 'medical equipment movers', 'hospital equipment movers' — all return Viking Rigging, Integrated Chamber Systems, Eagle Rigging, Sullivan Industrial. Overlap with industrial rigging is 4-5 (Eagle Rigging, Sullivan Industrial appear in both SERPs). Adjacent cluster. Kept small (2 posts) because domain is not primarily medical; serves as authority signal and lead-gen for specialty segment.

posts.title: MRI Machine Moving Services: Certified Rigging for Heavy Medical Imaging Equipment
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 42 KD (ESTIMATE). Viking Rigging, Integrated Chamber Systems, Eagle Rigging rank. Small field of specialists — a thorough page with technical detail (Zone IV protocols, quench piping, decommissioning) can rank.

posts.title: Moving Medical Equipment: A Complete Guide for Hospital & Clinic Relocations
posts.difficulty_estimate: MEDIUM — 38 KD (ESTIMATE). Sullivan Industrial and Eagle Rigging have the best current guides. Winnable by combining rigging expertise with compliance coverage (HIPAA, JCAHO, recalibration).

programmatic_templates.note: City pages should inherit internal links from their parent service page. Each city page targets '[service] + [city]' and '[service] near me' within that city's GSC data once site has Search Console coverage.

services_to_hold_editorial_only: crane-and-rigging-services (crane rental SERPs dominated by crane-only companies — city pages here dilute brand positioning)
heavy-haul-trucking (trucking marketplace SERPs diverge too far from rigging identity)

links.anchor: how to move heavy industrial equipment
industrial rigging and heavy haul services

serp_matrix.note: Scores based on WebSearch top-10 URL intersection analysis. All values are ESTIMATES from live SERP snapshots June 2026. Diagonal = 10. Key domain signals: Rigging-Busters, ProLift, Omega Morgan, Beck & Pollitzer appear across multiple clusters but on different sub-pages.

scorecard.notes: Every spoke receives: 1 mandatory link from pillar + 1-2 recommended links from sibling spokes + 1 optional cross-cluster link where applicable. Minimum 3 incoming links per spoke satisfied.
